Notice Of Motion And Defendant Chipotle Mexican Grill?S Motion To Compel Responses From Plaintiff Elaine Portillo To Supplemental Interrogatories
Off Calendar Jun-27-2024 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: RE: DEFENDANT CHIPOTLE MEXICAN GRILL, INC.'s, ERRONEOUSLY SUED AND SERVED HEREIN AS CHIPOTLE MEXICAN GRILL Motion To Compel Responses From Plaintiff Elaine Portillo To Supplemental Interrogatories.

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel, or Interested Person.

The court adopts its tentative ruling. Off calendar. The record reflects that on June 7, 2024, defendant Chipotle Mexican Grill, Inc. withdrew its motion to compel further responses by plaintiff to its supplementary discovery requests. Accordingly, there are no pending motions to which a tentative ruling is required.

Judge Pro Tem: Philip Ward. Clerk: R. Woods. Not Reported. (302/JPT)
